# CLARA Reviews AI Assistant — Test Cases for Review Owner Persona

**Source Document**: BRD - CLARA Reviews AI Assistant
**Persona**: Review Owner (First Line — executes quarterly reviews)
**Date Generated**: June 2, 2026
**Generated by**: pm-builder-agent

---

## Persona Context

**Role**: Executes quarterly reviews across controls, applications, and processes for SOX, ICFR, and broader compliance frameworks. Responsible for attesting to control effectiveness, evidence completeness, and documentation accuracy.

**Key Pain Points**:
- 45-60 minutes per review
- 35-40% rejection rate
- Manual evidence hunting across multiple systems
- Unclear rejection feedback requiring guesswork

**CLARA Value Proposition**:
- Pre-filled responses based on historical data and detected changes
- Real-time quality checks preventing common rejection causes
- Evidence validation before submission
- Rejection comments translated into actionable checklists

---

## Test Suite 1: Change Detection & Variance Summary (Epic-1.1)

### TC-OWN-001: No changes detected — green alert displayed
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Entity has prior completed review; no properties changed since last period

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review for entity with no changes | CLARA queries GRC system within 3 seconds |
| 2 | Observe change detection result | Green "No material changes detected" alert displayed |
| 3 | Verify alert content | Includes specific confirmation (e.g., "Application description, ownership, control count (12) unchanged") and timestamp |

### TC-OWN-002: Changes detected — organized delta summary
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Entity has property changes since last review period (e.g., new controls added, ownership change)

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review for entity with changes | Delta summary appears within 3 seconds |
| 2 | Verify change categorization | Changes organized by type: Properties, Control Changes, ITGC Changes, Monitoring Configuration Changes |
| 3 | Verify each change shows: what changed, when, who made the change | All three data points present for each item |
| 4 | Verify direct links | Each change includes a link to view details |
| 5 | Verify for Processes | Flowchart state classified as Added/Removed/Updated/No change |

### TC-OWN-003: Change detection verifies structural relationships
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Process with linked Applications and Controls

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open Process review | CLARA verifies existence of structural relationships |
| 2 | Check relationship verification | Process↔Applications, Process↔Controls, Process↔RACM relationships confirmed or gaps flagged |

### TC-OWN-004: Change detection with no prior review (first-time review)
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Entity has never been reviewed before

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review for new entity | Graceful message: "First review — no prior period available for comparison" |
| 2 | Verify no false change flags | No misleading delta shown |
| 3 | Verify pre-fill still attempts | Uses control page data for pre-fill even without comparison baseline |

---

## Test Suite 2: Pre-fill Response Generation (Epic-1.2)

### TC-OWN-005: Pre-fill for no-change scenario
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Change detection found no material changes

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Observe pre-filled response field | Suggested text appears in the response textbox |
| 2 | Verify content quality | Response follows SOX standards, includes concrete data (counts, dates, names) — e.g., "I confirm application details remain accurate and unchanged from Q3 2025. Control count (12), ownership (team-xyz), and ITGC mappings verified current." |
| 3 | Verify accept action | One-click accept button/interaction available |
| 4 | Verify edit action | Can modify the pre-filled text before accepting |
| 5 | Verify discard action | Can clear the suggestion and write from scratch |

### TC-OWN-006: Pre-fill for changes-detected scenario
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Change detection found 2 new controls added and ownership transferred

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Observe pre-filled response | Suggested text references specific changes: "2 new controls added (Control-A, Control-B), ownership transferred from team-abc to team-xyz on 2025-11-15" |
| 2 | Verify specificity | Response includes actual names, dates, and counts (not generic placeholders) |
| 3 | Accept pre-fill | Text accepted and saved to response field |

### TC-OWN-007: Pre-fill for Yes/No radio questions
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review question requires Yes/No selection

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View question with CLARA recommendation | CLARA recommendation panel shows suggested answer (e.g., "Yes") with expandable insight |
| 2 | Verify insight explains reasoning | Insight references historical pattern (e.g., "All 5 prior approved reviews answered Yes") |
| 3 | Verify one-click acceptance | Can accept recommendation with single interaction |
| 4 | Verify override possible | Can select opposite answer without restriction |

### TC-OWN-008: Pre-fill for dropdown/multi-select questions
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review question with dropdown (e.g., Question 6 — actions taken)

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View dropdown question with CLARA recommendation | Recommended selection(s) shown |
| 2 | Verify multi-select support | Can select multiple options where applicable |
| 3 | Accept recommendation | Selected options populate the field |

---

## Test Suite 3: Side-by-Side Comparison View (Epic-1.3)

### TC-OWN-009: Detailed comparison view accessible
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Changes detected between current and prior period

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Click "View Detailed Comparison" button in change summary | Side-by-side diff view opens |
| 2 | Verify layout | Left panel: prior period values; Right panel: current period values |
| 3 | Verify color coding | Additions = green, Deletions = red, Modifications = yellow |
| 4 | Verify collapsibility | Comparison view is collapsible/expandable; persistent throughout session |

---

## Test Suite 4: Monitoring Registration Checks (Epic-2)

### TC-OWN-010: All targets registered — success alert
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Application with all production targets registered in Delta

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review for fully-monitored application | CLARA auto-queries GRC-Next monitoring endpoints |
| 2 | Verify query speed | Results display within 3 seconds with loading indicator |
| 3 | Verify success state | Green alert: "✓ All monitoring complete - All [N] production targets registered. Last verified: [timestamp]" |
| 4 | Verify registration table | Shows: Environment Type, Total Count, Registered Count, Status (Complete) |
| 5 | Verify "Confirm Yes" button | One-click button to confirm monitoring for the question |

### TC-OWN-011: Monitoring gaps detected — error alert with action
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Application with 2 of 22 targets NOT registered

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review for partially-monitored application | Red alert: "2 monitoring gaps detected" |
| 2 | Verify gap details | Expandable list showing each unregistered target: type, creation date, account ID |
| 3 | Verify "Register Now" button | Each gap has a "Register Now" link to Delta registration workflow |
| 4 | Verify registration status table | Shows 20/22 registered with "Partial" status |

### TC-OWN-012: Re-validation after registration
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Monitoring gaps were detected; owner completed registrations in Delta

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Click "Re-validate Monitoring" button | Loading state shown; all endpoints re-queried |
| 2 | Verify updated results | Table updates to 22/22 registered |
| 3 | Verify resolved gaps marked | Green checkmarks on previously-missing targets |
| 4 | Verify success alert replaces error | Error alert removed; success alert displayed |

### TC-OWN-013: Monitoring API failure — graceful degradation
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: GRC-Next monitoring API is unavailable or times out

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review when API is down | Warning message within 5 seconds: "Unable to automatically verify monitoring registration" |
| 2 | Verify manual fallback | Direct link to GRC-Next monitoring page provided |
| 3 | Verify manual confirm/deny | Owner can still manually answer the question regardless of API status |

### TC-OWN-014: Violation and alert status check
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Application has open violations after confirming monitoring registration

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | After monitoring confirmed, observe violation check | CLARA queries for open violations |
| 2 | Verify violation display | Shows: count open vs. closed, severity (Sev 2/3/4), type (Deployment Monitoring V2, FIMv4) |
| 3 | Verify link to Delta | "View in Delta" link provided for each violation category |

---

## Test Suite 5: Smart N/A Detection (Epic-3)

### TC-OWN-015: Carnaval N/A when CloudWatch used
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Application uses CloudWatch (not Carnaval) for monitoring

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review for CloudWatch-monitored app | Info alert on Carnaval question: "No Carnaval alarms detected. This application uses CloudWatch for monitoring." |
| 2 | Verify auto-selection | "N/A" pre-selected for the Carnaval question |
| 3 | Verify suggested explanation | Specific details: "N/A - Application uses CloudWatch for monitoring (47 alarms configured) and custom dashboards (3 active). Carnaval not applicable." |
| 4 | Verify override possible | Owner can change from N/A to Yes/No if needed |

### TC-OWN-016: N/A detection for automated controls on IPA questions
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Control is IT General Control (automated, not manual)

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open IPA questions section | CLARA detects control type = IT General Control |
| 2 | Verify N/A recommendation | All IPA questions recommend N/A with explanation: "This control is an IT General Control — IPA questions apply only to manual controls" |
| 3 | Verify pre-selection | N/A pre-selected for all IPA questions |

### TC-OWN-017: N/A detection does NOT trigger for manual controls with IPA
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Control is Manual with documented IPA

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open IPA questions for manual control | CLARA does NOT suggest N/A |
| 2 | Verify guidance if N/A selected inappropriately | If owner selects N/A: "This control relies on IPA. The appropriate response should be 'Yes' rather than N/A." |
| 3 | Verify remediation options | [Update to Yes] or [Provide Exception Justification] buttons shown |

---

## Test Suite 6: Evidence Validation (Epic-4)

### TC-OWN-018: Evidence completeness validation — missing evidence
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Test procedure step requires evidence but none attached

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Trigger pre-submit validation | CLARA checks each test procedure step for evidence |
| 2 | Verify missing evidence flag | Error: "Missing evidence: Step [X] ([description]) requires at least one [type]. [Navigate to Step X]" |
| 3 | Verify actionable guidance | Specific instructions (e.g., "Attach repository link" or "Upload supporting document") |
| 4 | Verify inline highlighting | Uncovered steps highlighted in the evidence matrix |

### TC-OWN-019: Evidence link accessibility — broken link detected
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Evidence contains a link that returns 404

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Trigger evidence validation | CLARA checks all links (HTTP/HTTPS, code.amazon.com, S3, Wiki) |
| 2 | Verify broken link alert | "⚠ Broken link detected: [URL] (404 Not Found)" |
| 3 | Verify suggested fixes | "Link may have moved - verify correct URL" |
| 4 | Verify action options | [Test Again] [Replace Link] [Mark as Acknowledged] |

### TC-OWN-020: Evidence link accessibility — all links valid
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: All evidence links are accessible

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Trigger evidence validation | All links validated within 5 seconds per batch |
| 2 | Verify success state | Green checkmarks on all evidence links |
| 3 | Verify no false negatives | Accessible links not incorrectly flagged as broken |

### TC-OWN-021: Evidence validation for private/restricted links
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Evidence link is intentionally access-restricted (internal S3 bucket)

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Validation detects inaccessible link | Warning shown (not error) |
| 2 | Verify "Acknowledged" option | Owner can mark "Acknowledged - intentionally private link" |
| 3 | Verify no blocking | Acknowledged links don't block submission |

---

## Test Suite 7: Pre-Submit Quality Gate (BRD Flow Step 4)

### TC-OWN-022: Readiness score — all clear
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: All questions answered, evidence complete, no violations

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Click Submit or trigger pre-submit check | Readiness check runs |
| 2 | Verify score display | High-quality indicator shown (green) |
| 3 | Verify Submit enabled | Submit button active and clickable |
| 4 | Submit review | Review transitions to "Submitted" state |

### TC-OWN-023: Readiness score — issues found
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Required question unanswered, or evidence missing

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Attempt to submit | Quality gate triggers before actual submission |
| 2 | Verify missing items checklist | Specific items listed (e.g., "Question 1: No response selected") |
| 3 | Verify Submit blocked or warned | Either blocked with "Fix and re-check" or warned with option to proceed |
| 4 | Fix issues and re-check | Updated readiness reflects fixes |

### TC-OWN-024: Quality gate catches common rejection patterns proactively
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Historical data shows "vague responses" cause 15% of rejections

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Enter vague response (e.g., "Reviewed evidence") without specifics | Quality gate flags: "⚠ Vague response detected. This pattern causes 15% of rejections. Suggestion: Include specific evidence names, dates, and counts." |
| 2 | Verify flag is non-blocking | Owner can still submit but is warned |
| 3 | Verify suggestion is actionable | Tells the owner exactly what to add |

---

## Test Suite 8: Rejection-to-Checklist Translation (Epic-5)

### TC-OWN-025: Rejection comment parsed into checklist
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review was rejected with approver comments

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open rejected review | Banner: "Review Rejected — CLARA is creating action plan..." within 5 seconds |
| 2 | Verify checklist generation | Structured checklist appears with: Action Item Title, Issue, Required Fix, How to Fix (steps), Estimated Time, Resources (links) |
| 3 | Verify checkable items | Each item has a checkbox for tracking completion |

### TC-OWN-026: Rejection with multiple issues parsed correctly
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Rejection says "Missing monitoring evidence for Q4. Also, response to Q2 is vague"

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open rejected review | Two distinct checklist items generated |
| 2 | Verify item 1 | "Add monitoring evidence" — Issue: Missing evidence for Q4. Fix: Upload CloudWatch screenshot showing Q4 date range. ~10 min. [Open Evidence Upload] |
| 3 | Verify item 2 | "Update Q2 response with specifics" — Issue: Vague response. Fix: Include exact target counts. ~5 min. [View Delta Targets] |

### TC-OWN-027: Checklist item validation before re-submission
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Owner has fixed items from rejection checklist

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Check off completed item | CLARA validates where possible (queries GRC-Next, checks uploads) |
| 2 | Verify "Verified" status | Items that can be machine-verified show "✓ Verified" |
| 3 | Verify "Please verify manually" | Items that cannot be machine-verified show appropriate status |
| 4 | Attempt re-submit without fixing all items | Warning: "Previous rejection reason not addressed: [item]. Resubmitting without fixing will likely result in another rejection. [Go Back and Fix] [Resubmit Anyway]" |

### TC-OWN-028: Drafts response to approver summarizing fixes
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: All checklist items completed

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Complete all items and prepare to re-submit | CLARA drafts response comment to approver summarizing fixes |
| 2 | Verify draft content | Lists each fixed item with what was done |
| 3 | Verify editable | Owner can modify before submission |

---

## Test Suite 9: IPA Validation (Epic-8)

### TC-OWN-029: IPA documentation complete — confirmation
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Manual control with IPA source system, query, and owner all populated

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Select "Yes" for IPA completeness | CLARA verifies fields on control page |
| 2 | Verify confirmation | "✓ IPA documentation verified: source system, query, and owner all populated." |

### TC-OWN-030: IPA documentation missing — flag on "Yes" selection
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Manual control with IPA source system blank

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Select "Yes" for IPA completeness | CLARA detects missing fields |
| 2 | Verify gap flag | Flag: "IPA source system not populated on control page. Please update before confirming Yes." |

### TC-OWN-031: N/A prevention for manual controls with existing IPA
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Manual control with documented IPA; owner selects N/A

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Select "N/A" on IPA question for manual control with IPA | Guidance: "This control relies on IPA. The appropriate response should be 'Yes' rather than N/A." |
| 2 | Verify options | [Update to Yes] [Provide Exception Justification] |
| 3 | Verify submission blocked without action | Cannot submit with N/A unless exception justified |

## Test Suite 10: Intelligent Queue Prioritization (Epic-9)

### TC-OWN-032: Queue stats bar displays correctly
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Owner has 8 open reviews; 2 overdue, 5 with pre-fill ready

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review queue | Stats bar shows: "Open: 8 | Overdue/At Risk: 2 | Pre-fill Ready: 5" |
| 2 | Verify definitions | Overdue = due within 2 days or SLA breach; Pre-fill Ready = AI drafts available |

### TC-OWN-033: Queue sorting by composite priority
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Mix of overdue, previously-rejected, and normal reviews

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View queue order | Highest priority at top |
| 2 | Verify priority factors | Due date urgency + historical rejection count determine order |
| 3 | Verify tie-breaking | Same urgency: higher rejection count first → then pre-fill available first |

### TC-OWN-034: Queue shows pre-fill readiness indicator
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Some reviews have AI drafts ready, some don't

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | View queue | Pre-fill ready reviews show indicator (badge or icon) |
| 2 | Verify indicator meaning | Indicates AI drafts are available — review can be completed faster |

---

## Test Suite 11: Real-Time Quality Feedback During Editing (BRD Flow Step 3)

### TC-OWN-035: Vague answer flagged in real-time
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Owner types "Reviewed" with no further detail

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Type vague answer and move to next field | Real-time feedback appears: "Response may be too vague. Consider adding specific evidence counts or dates." |
| 2 | Verify non-blocking | Feedback is advisory — doesn't prevent moving forward |

### TC-OWN-036: Inconsistency detection between answers
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Owner says "Yes" to design effectiveness but earlier indicated control changes occurred

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Answer inconsistently across questions | CLARA flags: "Potential inconsistency: Q8 indicates changes occurred, but Q4 confirms design effectiveness unchanged. Please verify." |
| 2 | Verify link to conflicting answer | Can jump to the conflicting question |

### TC-OWN-037: Evidence coverage confirmation during editing
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Test procedure requires evidence; owner attaches a file

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Attach evidence file | CLARA confirms: "Evidence linked to Test Procedure Step 1 ✓" |
| 2 | Verify coverage indicator updates | Evidence matrix shows coverage status updated in real-time |

## Test Suite 12: Ineffective Control Notification (Epic-7)

### TC-OWN-038: Design Effectiveness = No triggers auto-notification
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Owner selects "No" for Design Effectiveness and submits

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Select "No" for Design Effectiveness | Warning shown that notification will trigger on submission |
| 2 | Submit review | GRC Task created automatically with: Review ID, Review Name, Failure type (Design) |
| 3 | Verify email sent | Email notification sent to Controllership Contact with summary and task link |
| 4 | Verify task content | Task includes: control failure summary, direct link, required next steps |

### TC-OWN-039: Operating Effectiveness = No triggers auto-notification
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Owner selects "No" for Operating Effectiveness and submits

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Select "No" for Operating Effectiveness | Warning shown |
| 2 | Submit review | GRC Task created: "Investigation Required - [Control Name] - Operating Effectiveness Failure (Q4 2025)" |
| 3 | Verify Controllership Contact notified | Email with summary and task link |

### TC-OWN-040: Both Design and Operating = No
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Owner selects "No" for both effectiveness questions

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Select "No" for both | Combined warning shown |
| 2 | Submit | Task created noting BOTH failure types |

## Test Suite 13: AI Governance — Owner View (Epic-11)

### TC-OWN-041: AI suggestions visible during Draft/In-Progress
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review in Draft state

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review in Draft state | CLARA suggestions, pre-fills, recommendations all visible |
| 2 | Verify full AI functionality | Change detection, pre-fill, quality checks, evidence validation all active |
| 3 | Verify "Generated by Clara" disclaimer | AI content clearly labeled with disclaimer |

### TC-OWN-042: AI suggestions suppressed after submission
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Owner submits review

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Submit review | Status changes to "Submitted" |
| 2 | Re-open the submitted review as the owner | CLARA suggestions no longer visible or editable |
| 3 | Verify only submitted responses shown | Clean human-authored responses only |

### TC-OWN-043: AI re-activated on rejection (new draft cycle)
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Review was submitted, then rejected by approver

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open rejected review | Review enters new Draft cycle |
| 2 | Verify AI re-activation | CLARA fully active again — suggestions, quality checks, rejection-to-checklist all available |
| 3 | Verify new pre-fill available | CLARA may update suggestions based on rejection feedback |

---

## Test Suite 14: Performance & Degradation

### TC-OWN-044: Change detection within 3-second SLA
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: Standard review with prior history

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review | Change detection query completes within 3 seconds (90th percentile) |
| 2 | Verify loading indicator | Spinner/loading state shown during query |

### TC-OWN-045: Full review workflow without CLARA
**Priority**: P0
**Precondition**: CLARA/Bedrock service unavailable

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review when CLARA is down | Review loads normally without AI features |
| 2 | Verify all questions answerable | All radio buttons, textboxes, dropdowns functional |
| 3 | Verify evidence upload works | Can attach files without AI validation |
| 4 | Verify Submit works | Can submit review without pre-submit AI quality gate |
| 5 | Verify no error messages block workflow | Graceful degradation — no broken UI |

## Test Suite 15: Edge Cases

### TC-OWN-046: Review with maximum questions (13 questions + IPA)
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Control review with all standard questions plus IPA section

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open full review | All questions rendered with CLARA recommendations |
| 2 | Verify each question has a recommendation | 13/13 questions show CLARA insight |
| 3 | Accept all recommendations | All responses populated correctly |
| 4 | Submit | Pre-submit quality gate validates all 13 responses |

### TC-OWN-047: Long free-text response handling
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Owner writes a 2000+ character response

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Enter long response in text field | Field accepts full response without truncation |
| 2 | Verify CLARA still provides feedback | Quality check handles long text (doesn't flag as vague just because it's long) |
| 3 | Verify pre-submit handles correctly | Long response doesn't break quality gate |

### TC-OWN-048: Multiple evidence files attached to single test procedure
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Test procedure step requires evidence; owner attaches 5 files

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Attach multiple files to one step | All files accepted and linked |
| 2 | Verify evidence matrix | Shows count of evidence per step |
| 3 | Verify link validation | All 5 file links validated for accessibility |

### TC-OWN-049: Review for control that spans multiple applications
**Priority**: P1
**Precondition**: Control linked to 3 different applications

| Step | Action | Expected Result |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open review for multi-application control | CLARA handles cross-entity context |
| 2 | Verify change detection covers all linked apps | Delta summary includes changes from all 3 applications |
| 3 | Verify monitoring check covers all apps | Monitoring registration verified for all linked applications |
